states.label: Report received
states.description: Report has been logged. Initial triage required.
required_actions: Check for duplicate reports at same location

states.label: Assigned to contractor
states.description: Case assigned. Contractor to attend and clear.
required_actions: Contractor to attend within SLA (48hrs standard, 24hrs large-scale)
Photograph waste before and after clearance
Check for evidence of perpetrator in waste

states.label: Waste cleared
states.description: Fly-tipping has been cleared from site.
required_actions: If evidence found, refer to enforcement within 24hrs
Check if hotspot review triggered (3+ reports in 30 days)

states.label: Awaiting evidence
states.description: Evidence gathering in progress for enforcement action.

states.label: Enforcement action
required_actions: Serve Fixed Penalty Notice or prosecution referral

states.label: Escalated
required_actions: Brief area manager on case history
Identify reason for escalation (SLA breach, recurrence, volume)

states.label: Closed
required_actions: Send satisfaction survey if reporter contactable

states.label: Report received
required_actions: Check for injury/near-miss mentions — if found, flag Category 1
Assign to FM Conway highways team

states.label: Emergency response
required_actions: Schedule permanent repair within 7 working days

states.label: Inspection scheduled
required_actions: If Category 1, transition to emergency response immediately

states.label: Repair scheduled
required_actions: Schedule repair within SLA (Cat 1: 7 days, Cat 2: 7 days, Cat 3: 28 days)
Notify reporter of estimated repair date

states.label: Closed
states.description: Defect repaired or assessed as no action required.
required_actions: Log repair details or reason for closure

states.label: Report received
required_actions: If hate-related: report to Metropolitan Police and set 24hr SLA
If near school/hospital/place of worship: auto-uplift to high priority

states.label: Assigned to contractor
required_actions: Determine if graffiti is on council or private property
If council property: schedule removal within SLA
If private property: notify property owner

states.label: Owner notified
states.description: Private property owner notified. 14-day window for self-removal.
required_actions: Send notification letter to property owner
Allow 14 days for owner to arrange removal
If not removed after 14 days, consider defacement removal notice

states.label: Escalated
states.description: Case escalated — SLA breach or councillor enquiry.
required_actions: If councillor enquiry: respond within 5 working days

states.label: Report received
required_actions: Classify: single lamp, area outage (3+), or emergency (column down/exposed wiring)

states.label: Assigned to contractor
required_actions: Contractor to inspect within 5 working days
If third-party coordination needed (UKPN), log reference and chase weekly

states.label: Under review
states.description: Fault diagnosed. Repair in progress or awaiting third party.
required_actions: If area outage >7 days: conduct pedestrian safety assessment
If approaching double-SLA: prepare escalation report

states.label: Emergency response
states.description: Emergency lighting fault. Make-safe within 2 hours.

states.label: Report received
required_actions: Classify noise source (construction, residential, commercial, entertainment)
Check for existing cases at same location

states.label: Under investigation
required_actions: If statutory nuisance confirmed: serve abatement/Section 60 notice
If 3+ complaints in 30 days: classify as persistent, escalate

states.label: Notice served
states.description: Statutory notice served on noise source.
required_actions: Log notice type, date, and conditions
If breach observed: evidence gathering for prosecution

states.label: Monitoring compliance
required_actions: If breach + previous history: prepare prosecution file

states.label: Escalated
states.description: Referred to senior EH officer or legal.
required_actions: Brief senior officer or legal services
Provide full case chronology and evidence

states.label: Closed
states.description: Case resolved — noise ceased, notice complied with, or no action required.
required_actions: Schedule monitoring if notice remains active

states.label: Report received
required_actions: Route to outreach provider via StreetLink
Check if individual is known to services
Flag any welfare/health concerns mentioned in report

states.label: Outreach assigned
required_actions: If not located: two further attempts within 7 days

states.label: Under review
states.description: Individual engaged. Support plan being developed.
required_actions: If health concerns: NHS outreach GP referral within 48hrs
Log all engagement attempts and outcomes

states.label: Escalated
states.description: Referred to senior outreach coordinator or multi-agency panel.
required_actions: Multi-agency referral if needed (mental health, substance use, immigration)
Case conference if individual at significant risk
Do NOT pursue enforcement without exhausting support options

states.label: Closed
states.description: Individual housed, moved on, or no longer at location.
required_actions: Log outcome (housed, reconnected, no longer rough sleeping, not found)
Schedule follow-up check if individual was housed

states.label: Report received
required_actions: Log report with location and description
Check if premises has previous enforcement history

states.label: Evidence gathering
required_actions: Prepare Section 34 investigation notice within 7 days

states.label: Investigation notice served
states.description: Section 34 notice served. Awaiting business response.
required_actions: Review waste transfer notes if provided
If no response after 14 days: proceed to FPN

states.label: Pending decision
required_actions: If compliant: close with advisory letter
If FPN not paid in 14 days: prosecution referral

states.label: Escalated
states.description: Referred to senior enforcement officer or legal.
required_actions: Provide full evidence pack to senior officer
If prosecution: refer to legal services

states.label: Closed
states.description: Case concluded — FPN paid, prosecution complete, or no action.
required_actions: Schedule duty of care audit within 6 months if breach found

states.label: Inspection scheduled
required_actions: Confirm vehicle meets abandoned criteria (2+ indicators)
If not abandoned: close with reason

states.label: Awaiting DVLA response
states.description: Waiting for DVLA trace result and notice period to expire.
required_actions: Check vehicle status after 7-day notice expires
If taxed with registered keeper: send warning letter
If no keeper found or untaxed: arrange removal

states.label: Removal arranged
required_actions: Vehicle held for 14 days before disposal

states.label: Closed
states.description: Vehicle removed, reclaimed by owner, or confirmed not abandoned.

states.label: Report received
required_actions: Check for duplicate/recurring reports at this location

states.label: Assigned to contractor
states.description: Emptying job assigned to waste contractor.
required_actions: Contractor to empty within next scheduled round or 24hrs if urgent
If recurring (3+ reports in 30 days): flag for capacity review

states.label: Bin emptied
required_actions: Check if recurring pattern triggers capacity review

states.label: Capacity review
states.description: Reviewing whether bin needs replacement or increased collection frequency.
required_actions: Assess current collection frequency vs demand
Recommend: increased frequency, larger bin, or BigBelly compactor

states.label: Awaiting evidence
states.description: Awaiting data to support infrastructure change.
required_actions: Gather footfall data, collection logs, report history

states.label: Escalated
states.description: Escalated to area manager for infrastructure decision.
required_actions: Present business case to area manager
Await decision on bin replacement or schedule change

states.label: Closed
states.description: Issue resolved — bin emptied, replaced, or schedule adjusted.
required_actions: Update bin asset register if changed
